linting.notes: Primary linter is oxlint (fast Rust-based TypeScript/JavaScript linter). Also uses pre-commit hooks for additional checks. The 'pnpm check' command runs all static checks including lint, format check, and type checking.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses vitest vi.mock() and vi.stubEnv() for mocking
testing.notes: Tests located in src/**/*.test.ts, extensions/**/*.test.ts, and test/**/*.test.ts. Excludes **/*.live.test.ts and **/*.e2e.test.ts from default runs. Uses pool=forks for test isolation. Multiple vitest configs for different test types (unit, e2e, channels, extensions, gateway). The canvas:a2ui:bundle step is required before running tests.

ci.notes: CI runs on pull_request and push to main. Heavy jobs (test, build, platform-specific) skip on docs-only changes. Tests are sharded (2 shards on Linux, 6 on Windows) for performance. Platform-specific checks (macOS, Windows, Android) only run when relevant files change. Pre-commit hooks enforced in CI.

build.notes: Build pipeline: 1) pnpm canvas:a2ui:bundle (bundles UI components), 2) tsdown build (TypeScript bundler), 3) various post-build scripts. Build outputs to dist/. Requires Node.js >= 22.16.0. Package manager is pnpm@10.23.0. Also builds Swift apps for macOS/iOS and Android APK.

conventions.notes: Uses strict TypeScript. All source in src/, extensions/, tests in test/ and alongside source. Monorepo with 73 workspace projects managed by pnpm.

setup_commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y git make python3 curl
